## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo test --test capability_fixture --test mimo_capabilities --test deepseek_capabilities --test kimi_capabilities --test protocol_fixture`
- [ ] Manual smoke test, if this changes client setup, routing, provider behavior, or release assets

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked or described the related issue / discussion.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, setup, or troubleshooting changed.
- [ ] I did not include API keys, local paths with secrets, or unredacted diagnostic logs.
- [ ] I checked that generated provider catalog files are up to date when provider presets changed.
